nasb.text: “Thus says the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel, ‘I have broken the yoke of the king of Babylon.

esv.text: “Thus says the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel: I have broken the yoke of the king of Babylon.

cnv.text: “萬軍之耶和華以色列的　神這樣說：‘我已經折斷了巴比倫王的軛。

ccb.text: “以色列的上帝——万军之耶和华说，‘我必折断巴比伦王奴役你们的轭。
